jurisdiction.name: Columbia County
jurisdiction.city_hall_address: 630 Ronald Reagan Drive, Building A, Evans, GA 30809

appointed_rosters.notes: Found by the 2026-06-13 findings re-audit (refuted member_roster_missing): full PC roster with roles, districts, and member emails under the 'Members' heading; cross-confirmed against the 2026-05-07 approved-minutes roll call. Roster also mirrored at /603/Boards-Commissions-and-Authorities.

officials_roster.notes: Board of Commissioners directory page. Verify member count + districts during first onboarding pass.

meeting_agendas_minutes.notes: OData JSON API. Events endpoint per category; attachments via Meetings/GetAttachmentFile(fileId=N).

property_records.notes: Same property platform as Grovetown — county is the parcel-records source for everything inside Columbia County.

campaign_finance.notes: Pre-2027 county candidate filings held by County Clerk.

known_gaps.explanation: Columbia County School District (CCSD) is a constitutionally independent jurisdiction, not a body under county government. CCSD has its own elected Board of Education, taxing authority, and budget. Modeled separately as type=school_district once that jurisdiction is added.
known_gaps.user_facing_message: Columbia County School District is separate from county government — its records will live at its own jurisdiction page when added.
known_gaps.remediation: Onboard CCSD as a separate jurisdiction.

known_gaps.explanation: Sheriff, District Attorney, Tax Commissioner, Probate Court Judge, etc. are individually-elected constitutional officers — not voting bodies. Currently modeled as governing_bodies which is structurally wrong. Future schema work needed.
known_gaps.user_facing_message: Pages for the Sheriff, DA, and elected court judges are not yet indexed.
known_gaps.remediation: Add 'constitutional_officer' jurisdiction type or per-officer profile schema.
